Task:
Author the MVP course content and wire it into the game.

Requirements:
- create short lesson content for all 3 courses
- keep each lesson concise and rewarding
- use structured content objects
- each lesson should have:
  - id
  - title
  - concept
  - shortPrompt
  - interactionType
  - completionReward
  - unlocks
- the content should feel beginner-friendly and practical
- the course content should directly contribute to the final portfolio project

Return:
- content files
- any rendering code needed
- explanation
- recommended commit message
